title: Alameda's 4th of July Parade
description: The longest hometown parade in the nation — 3.3 miles down Park Street. Bands, floats, the whole island shows up.

title: Marcus King Band
description: Darling Blue Tour Pt. 2. Marcus King's southern soul and blues rock in one of Oakland's most beautiful rooms.

title: Soul of Our Nation — Opening Reception
description: Opening reception for a new exhibition exploring American identity. Live music, art, good people.

title: Widespread Panic
description: Three nights at the Fox. Widespread Panic doing what they do — long, loose, and loud. Jul 16–18.

title: Rhythmix in the Parks: Sekhou Senegal
description: West African music and dance from twin brothers from a long line of griots. Bring chairs and blankets, all ages welcome.

title: 39th Art & Wine Faire
description: 200+ vendors, live music on three stages, craft beer and wine. Two days (Jul 25–26). One of the best street fairs in the East Bay.

title: The Woggles + Hot Laundry
description: Garage rock and punk at one of SF's best small venues. $15 at the door, $12 advance.

title: Peter Rowan & Sam Grisman Project — Rex Foundation Benefit
description: A benefit for the Rex Foundation performing music from Old & In The Way. Outdoor amphitheater, bring a layer.

title: Pour Your HeART Out — Arts Benefit
description: Afternoon fundraiser for local arts programming. Good cause, good vibes.

title: Widowspeak + Dead Gowns
description: Dreamy indie from Widowspeak with Dead Gowns opening. Perfect small-venue night.

title: Poppy
description: Genre-defying pop-meets-metal from one of the most interesting artists working right now.

title: Lukas Nelson — Future Soul 2026 Tour
description: Son of Willie, voice of his own. Lukas Nelson brings his country soul to the outdoor Greek.

title: PLOSIVS, Tijuana Panthers, Minus Numbers
description: Three-band punk and garage rock blowout. PLOSIVS features members of Rocket From the Crypt.

title: Bartees Strange — In Times of Dragons Tour
description: Bartees Strange plays indie rock that sounds like nothing else. One of the best live acts going right now.
